mapper.sql: id, mobile_number as mobileNumber, mobile_area as mobileArea, mobile_type as mobileType, area_code as areaCode, post_code as postCode, province_code as provinceCode, created, create_id as createId, updated, update_id as updateId, is_delete as isDelete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4

sql.if: and ( mobile_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or mobile_area like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or mobile_type like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or province_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or post_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: select count(1) from mobile_area where is_delete = 0

select
from mobile_area where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0

select substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) as id, substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) as areaname, substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) as provName from mobile_area where is_delete = 0 and mobile_area is not null and mobile_area != '' group by substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) order by substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) asc

select mobile_area as id, case when locate(' ', mobile_area) > 0 then substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', -1) else mobile_area end as areaname, case when locate(' ', mobile_area) > 0 then substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', -1) else mobile_area end as cityName, mobile_area as mobileArea, min(area_code) as areaCode, min(post_code) as postCode, min(province_code) as provinceCode from mobile_area where is_delete = 0 and substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) = #{provinceCode} group by mobile_area order by mobile_area asc

select
from mobile_area where is_delete = 0 and substring_index(mobile_area, ' ', 1) = #{provinceCode} and mobile_area = #{mobileArea} order by id asc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into mobile_area
id, mobile_number, mobile_area, mobile_type, area_code, post_code, province_code, created, create_id, updated, update_id, is_delete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4,
#{id}, #{mobileNumber}, #{mobileArea}, #{mobileType}, #{areaCode}, #{postCode}, #{provinceCode}, #{created}, #{createId}, #{updated}, #{updateId}, #{isDelete}, #{extend1}, #{extend2}, #{extend3}, #{extend4},
mapper.update:
update mobile_area
mobile_number = #{mobileNumber}, mobile_area = #{mobileArea}, mobile_type = #{mobileType}, area_code = #{areaCode}, post_code = #{postCode}, province_code = #{provinceCode}, updated = #{updated}, update_id = #{updateId}, extend1 = #{extend1}, extend2 = #{extend2}, extend3 = #{extend3}, extend4 = #{extend4},
where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0

update mobile_area set is_delete = 1, updated = #{updated}, update_id = #{updateId} where is_delete = 0 and id in
#{id}
